jd_text: Act as Technical Authority with corporate accountability for technical delivery across Hydrodynamics and Mooring system disciplines. Support Director - EPC Engineering (Hull & Marine) on development and stewardship of strategies towards capability development, sustainment and industry engagements. Day-to-day operations: Manage technical stewardship and due diligence of project deliverables for Hydrodynamics and Mooring engineering disciplines and interface with counterparts across Floater and Topside Facilities disciplines. Provide support to EPC functional and business leadership on market developments, competitor assessment, corporate business strategy developments. Identify and steward development and career path for discipline personnel. Technical competencies: Advanced working knowledge on design and operational aspects of floating structures and mooring systems. Well versed and abreast with industry standards, guidelines, procedures, specifications and hydrodynamics discipline engineering deliverables for various project execution phases. Technical ownership on development of knowledge-based engineering tools and systems for discipline capability scaling and sustainment. Strong delivery track record of end-to-end solution engineering across concept definition, technology development and project execution life cycle for floater designs and mooring / riser system integration aspects. Demonstratable industry / market acumen and broad networking within OEMs / engineering service providers / industry committees. Well versed hand-on expertise on one or more aspects related to offshore floater sizing and layout development, subsea interfaces and equipment selection, floater stability and weight control, structural design and hydrodynamic analysis (floaters & mooring system). CAE Skills : Working experience with Microsoft platforms such as SharePoint, OneDrive and Office suite. Hands-on experience with 2D drafting tools such as AutoCAD or similar, 3D modelling environment such as AVEVA E3D or similar, NURBS modelling tools such as Rhinoceros 3D or similar. Working experience with one or more areas of industry standard analysis tools for rules-based floater design / floater stability / structural / hydrodynamics & mooring engineering. Expertise in developing workflow automation tools using Excel VBA Macros / Python or equivalent scripting frameworks is a minimum requirement. Behavioral Competencies: Strategic Planning and organizing skills Accountability, Adaptability and Ownership Advanced Inter-personnel Communication Advanced Decision-making skills Mentoring, Team building and motivation Cross-functional Collaboration and Resilient Mindset Conflict Management and Resolution Oriented Problem Solving Team and Stakeholder Performance Management Business Acumen and Drive Initiatives Education Master’s Degree in: Ocean Structures (or) Offshore Engineering (or) Naval Architecture (or) Marine Technology Doctorate Degree in: Ocean Structures (or) Offshore Engineering (or) Naval Architecture (or) Marine Technology Experience Minimum cumulative experience 20+ years of experience with current role as in two or more of the following industry players culminating to role as Principal Engineer / Subject Matter Expert: (1) Tier – I EPCIC Turnkey Services and Contractor Organizations as Principal and Subject Matter Expert roles. (2) Specialists’ offshore floater / subsea engineering service providers with track record on floater / mooring system concept definition to construction follow up / handover phase ownership. (3) Offshore Production Units Lease-Own-Operate organizations. Functional membership in industrial networks such as OMAE / ISOPE / OTC / SPE committees and organizations. Strong network with OEMs and engineering service industry.
